tweets.text:
.@FEMA’s Disaster Relief Fund —the funding used to respond to and recover from disasters—has fallen below the level needed to sustain normal operations, with CURRENT projections showing ONLY about 30 days of remaining funding capacity, forcing FEMA to implement Immediate Needs Funding. Something FEMA has NEVER done in a shutdown.

Because Democrats refuse to fund DHS, disaster recovery efforts may be delayed until funding is restored — endangering countless American lives.

Democrats must stop playing political games and REOPEN DHS NOW.
